name: shape-rotator-os
description: Shape Rotator OS — Electron app for the cohort. Atlas of indexed pages, alchemy view of the cohort (teams + projects + people), local-first peer search via swf-node, and a profile editor that submits PRs against this repo.

scripts.vendor:web: node scripts/build-ics.js && rm -rf apps/web/shape-ui && cp -R packages/shape-ui apps/web/shape-ui && cp apps/os/src/cohort-surface.json apps/web/cohort-surface.json && cp cohort-data/calendar.ics apps/web/calendar.ics
scripts.deploy:web: npm run vendor:web && cd apps/web && vercel deploy --prod --yes
